title: An efficient procedure to compute the continuous Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff formula
author: Ana Arnal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Mathematica  program to illustrate the results in the paper An efficient procedure to compute the continuous Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff formula, by A. Arnal, F. Casas and C. Chiralt.  To run the program, just Evaluate Notebook in the menu Evaluation.  By default, the program computes Table 2 in the paper.
steps_raw: Mathematica  program to illustrate the results in the paper An efficient procedure to compute the continuous Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff formula, by A. Arnal, F. Casas and C. Chiralt.  To run the program, just Evaluate Notebook in the menu Evaluation.  By default, the program computes Table 2 in the paper.
